author: y4rr
content: Fixed in commit 92a19db3 as part of Sprint B.4 (#914). Root cause: test passed rank-0 backend as parent for SubBackend::new(parent, [1,2,3]) but rank 0 is not in members, so SubBackend correctly rejected it. Fix: test now uses nth(first_member) to get the rank-1 backend as parent — whose global rank IS in members. No source-side change to SubBackend::new needed; its validation is correct. cascade_skip removed. Test passes.
